title: ANS Receipt
description: A single cryptographically signed receipt in the ANS audit chain

receipt_id.description: Hex SHA-256 (first 16 bytes) of the canonical signable bytes

phase.description: pre = before execution, post = after execution

agent_id.description: Agent identifier derived from Ed25519 public key hash

parent_agent_id.description: Parent agent ID for sub-agent delegation chains

prev_receipt_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous receipt in the chain (genesis = 64 zeros)

chain_index.description: Monotonically increasing index (no gaps, enforced by SQLite PK)

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 of the action payload (computed by the client)

authorizing_context.description: Pre-action only: context for the authorization decision

outcome_summary.description: Post-action only: summary of the outcome

duration_ms.description: Post-action only: execution duration in milliseconds

pre_receipt_id.description: Post-action only: links to the corresponding pre-receipt

signature.description: Ed25519 signature (hex, 64 bytes) over the canonical signable bytes
